taxonomy: Hecatactis is a genus of algae, specifically a type of green alga. The classification of Hecactis is within the division Chlorophyta and the class Chlorophyceae. The class Chlorophyceae is further divided into several orders, with Hecactis being part of the order Ulotrichales. The order Ulotrichales is characterized by its members' simple, unbranched filaments and lack of flagella. As a result, Hecactis is classified as Ulotrichales, Chlorophyceae, Chlorophyta.
